title: WHOISleuth
description: Domain intelligence console for registration, DNS, certificate and web evidence. Built with SvelteKit and Node.js.

title: Breach Gazette
image_alt: Breach Gazette public breach notifications overview
description: Official breach notifications, statistics and regulatory updates in one public data site. Built with Python and Astro.

title: ControlCurrent
description: Helps web teams choose security features that work across the browsers they need to support. Built with Astro and TypeScript.

title: Forty Life
description: Magic: The Gathering life counter with rotating layouts, commander art and multiplayer tracking. Built with Svelte.

title: ReVue MongoDB
image_alt: ReVue album review homepage with top-rated albums
description: Music review app for browsing albums and publishing reviews with user accounts and moderation. Built with Vue, TypeScript and MongoDB.

title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio website that allows me to showcase my web projects. Built with Astro and Tailwind CSS.
